THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE WHIM COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEVEN SEAS CLUBS, INC. IF SEVEN SEAS CLUBS, INC. & PAUL CURRIER VACATE PREMISES BY 11:59 P.M. ON MAY 31, 2004, WHIM WILL WAIVE ANY MONEY DAMAGES UNDER THIS JUDGMENT.
